3209160.name: Grandpa's Bee Haven
3209160.description:
Grandpa’s Bee Haven is an engaging idle-beekeeping simulator designed to sit at the bottom of your screen while you multitask.

Set Up Your Apiary

Place different beehives in ideal locations for you and populate them with different bee species. Ensure your bees thrive by adding nearby watering stations and making inspections. Add honey extractors for harvesting honey and Solar Melters for collecting beeswax.

Produce and Upgrade

Unlock hive upgrades to generate valuable resources like honey, pollen, beeswax, propolis, and royal jelly. Use these resources to invest in further upgrades or craft unique products.

Craft Unique Products

Upgrade hives to produce different resources like beeswax, pollen, propolis and jelly that can be crafted into game money for even more upgrades. You can craft either one by one, box by box or even pallet by pallet.

Hire Helpers

Expand the bee haven team with charming helpers! Recruit Grandma, a Scientist, a Shaman, or even a loyal Dog or Cat. Helpers have different capabilities: Grandma boosts production alongside with Grandpa, while the Scientist does the inspections for you. Shaman can play flute and make the rain dance.

Design Your Bee Paradise

Create a stunning bee-garden that reflects your style. Be a perfectionist or get really creative with flowers, lush bushes, and beautiful trees.
